achievements.title: Face Melter
achievements.description: Jack a Spike in 'A New Hop' without taking any damage and by not using any light or heavy attacks beforehand as Crash.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: A Bit on the Heavy Side
achievements.description: Complete 'A Succumbing to Age Story' without losing a life and without jacking a Snipe.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Zero Damage Taken
achievements.description: Complete 'A Zero's Journey' without taking any damage as Crash.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Temple of Boom
achievements.description: Complete 'The Temple of Zoom' without losing a life and without jacking a Spike.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: A Bandicoot and His Board
achievements.description: Complete 'The Emerald Pity' without taking any damage and without jacking a Rhinoroller.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Endangered and Lovin' It
achievements.description: Complete 'Don't Eat the Yellow Brick Load' without losing a life and without defeating any more than ten Koo-ala's.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Coming In Hot
achievements.description: Complete 'The Blizzard of Claws' without losing a life and by jacking a Magmadon and Snipe once.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Trophic Level
achievements.description: Complete 'Life's a Beach' without losing a life and by jacking a single Spike, Magmadon and Goar.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Natural Selection
achievements.description: Complete 'Operation Overboard' without losing a life and without jacking the same Titan more than once.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Are You Not Entertained!?
achievements.description: Complete 'A Sludge Too Far' without taking any damage as Crash.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: You're as Cold as Ice
achievements.description: Jack 20 Ratcicles in 'Shock and Awesome' without losing a life. (No Ratcicle costume).
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Cold Hard Construction
achievements.description: Complete 'Weapons of Mass Construction' without losing a life, falling off the map and without jacking any titan.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Mephitophobia
achievements.description: Complete 'Doomraker' without losing a life and without jacking a Stench.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Ain't Afraid of Heights
achievements.description: Complete 'Family Tree' without losing a life or falling off the map.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: I Got Out Again, Neo
achievements.description: Complete 'Calamityville Horror' without taking any damage as Crash.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Evasive Maneuvers
achievements.description: Complete 'Timber Trials' without losing a life and without jacking anything other than Rhinorollers.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Ooh, I Love This Part!
achievements.description: Complete 'Adolt Edumacation' without losing a life and without jacking a Battler.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: For Watt It's Worth
achievements.description: Complete 'War of the Whirls' without losing a life and only by jacking a single Ee-Lectric.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Shaky Harmony
achievements.description: Complete 'Minority Rapport' without taking any damage as Crash and without jacking a Magmadon.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Pest Control
achievements.description: Jack the Arachnina in 'Revengeance 2: The Revengicide' without losing a life and without jacking a Scorporilla.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Alive and Kicking
achievements.description: Complete the game on Hard difficulty and unlock the Free Kick.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Master at Harms
achievements.description: Defeat a total of 1,000 minion fodder.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Brutal Buffet
achievements.description: Jack a total of 500 titans.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Wombo Combo!
achievements.description: Get a combo of 200 hits or more.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser

achievements.title: Mojoholic
achievements.description: Collect 100,000 Mojo in a single level.
achievements.author: Excessiveiser
